import pandas as pd


def save_dataframe_to_db(df: pd.DataFrame, table_name: str, engine):
    df.to_sql(table_name, engine, if_exists="append", index=False, method="multi", chunksize=1000)


def export_users_to_database(users_df: pd.DataFrame, conn):
    users_df.to_sql("users", conn, if_exists="append", index=False, chunksize=5000)
